headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.cdnfonts.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.cdnfonts.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.cdninstagram.com https://*.fbcdn.net https://*.instagram.com; frame-src https://www.instagram.com; connect-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com https://fonts.cdnfonts.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
